response.original_title: ヤヤバカゆったりさん
response.overview: A collection of indie short movies from indie movie group "Cinema Hihoukan"  1- Guroizo-- X Aishuu no Sayuri-chan  Violent parody of the Manga/Anime "Obake no Q-Tarō"  2- Sakura no Ame, Itsuka  Cutesy music video  3- Titanic-San  Parody of Titanic  4- Poppo-Ya 4  Parody of the Ken Takakura movie "Poppo-ya"  5-  Cho-Dokonjō Gaeru (Part 1)  Parody of the Manga/Anime "Dokojo Gaeru",  to be continued...  6-  Munekyun Deka  Parody of Japanese detective shows where the main detective can feel the presence of criminals nearby whenever her "Heart Flutters"  7- Koi no Wan Wan March  One man monologue about a man pouring his heart out for a lady but then he gets shot and dies.  8- LoliCop  Robocop parody where a Lolicon seeks revenge from his fellow Lolicon who betrayed him for reasons.
response.title: YaYaBaka Yuttari-San
